title: Score LightRAG context-source references only after the Docker API exports source paths

encoding.reason: LightRAG representative context-source scoring is incomplete when the opt-in Docker API service is not started or does not export context, references, or file paths for the generated corpus.

follow_up.title: Run LightRAG context-source export with the Docker service profile
follow_up.reason: The representative job can score source references after /query only_need_context returns generated file paths or content that maps to evidence ids.

items.text: LightRAG representative contract: score context navigation only when /query context export returns generated source file paths, source snippets, or reference content mapped to benchmark evidence ids.

locator.quote: /query context export returns generated source file paths, source snippets, or reference content

items.text: LightRAG boundary: missing or unreachable Docker API service is an incomplete setup state, not evidence of graph-RAG citation quality.

locator.quote: missing or unreachable Docker API service is an incomplete setup state

timeline.summary: LightRAG context-source scoring needs context export with generated source mappings.

prompt.content: Score LightRAG source-reference navigation only when context export is available.

must_include.text: LightRAG context-source scoring requires exported context or references mapped to evidence ids.

must_not_include: ELF beats LightRAG on source-reference navigation.

required_evidence.quote: /query context export returns generated source file paths, source snippets, or reference content
missing or unreachable Docker API service is an incomplete setup state

answer_correctness.criteria: Must preserve incomplete setup status when the API does not export context.

evidence_grounding.criteria: Must require generated source paths or content mappings before scoring.

trap_avoidance.criteria: Must not treat service reachability as graph-RAG quality.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true
